response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. Their background is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems with no evidence of financial systems development or Windows-based C++ work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions across multiple languages
Demonstrated experience in CI/CD, testing, and developer tooling
Active knowledge sharing and community engagement via workshops
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform
Zero mention of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle exposure
